name: npm-lifecycle-demo
description: A demo app to learn npm lifecycle commands

scripts.poststart: echo '✅ [poststart]   → Runs AFTER npm start exits'
scripts.prebuild: echo '🔧 [prebuild]    → Cleaning old build...' && node scripts/clean.js
scripts.postbuild: echo '✅ [postbuild]   → Build complete! Files are in /dist'
scripts.prepublishOnly: echo '🔧 [prepublishOnly] → Final checks before publishing to npm'
scripts.prepare: echo '📦 [prepare]        → Runs on install AND before publish'
scripts.version: echo '🔢 [version]     → Runs when you change version (npm version patch)'
scripts.postversion: echo '✅ [postversion] → After version bump (good for git push)'

author: You
